AS TO FORM INTERROGATORY 17.1, AS THE RESPONSES STATE THAT DISCOVERY IS CONTINUING AND INCLUDE STATEMENTS THAT THE RESPONSES INCLUDE THE FACTS STATED, THOUGH NOT LIMITED TO THOSE STATED FACTS, THE RESPONSES ARE INADEQUATE AND THE LANGUAGE IS ORDERED STRICKEN. AS THE RESPONSES STATE THAT INVESTIGATION AND DISCOVERY ARE CONTINUING AND ONGOING, THAT PORTION OF THE RESPONSES IS ORDERED STRICKEN. AS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES NO. 34, THE WORK PRODUCT OBJECTION IS ORDERED STRICKEN. FURTHER RESPONSES SHALL BE MADE ON OR BEFORE FEBRUARY 25, 2005. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED.
